subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He in Whose hand is the Kingdom of the Realm of Eternity and the Dominion of might in the divine cloud - He doeth whatsoever He willeth with His Most Glorious Servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحان الذی بیده ملکوت ملک البقا و جبروت عز العما یفعل ما یشاء بعبده الابهی
subcodes.subjects: @the concourse on high, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @symbolism
